source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ CE MDD/■ 9. TCF_ADD(HAD1417MCW) 221215 (Rev.4) - PMS Update/Attachment 12. Shipping Test Report/Shipping Test Report (Doc.No.SGS-R20-1631-EN00).pdf

document.title: Test Report SGS-R20-1631-EN00
authorityOrJurisdiction: SGS Korea Co., Ltd. Dongtan Laboratory

sourceSummary.oneLine: SGS Korea test report for packaged vibration and drop testing of the HAD1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
keyPoints: Applicant and manufacturer are listed as H&abyz.
The product tested is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, model HAD1417MCW.
The test was conducted on May 07, 2020 at SGS Korea Co., Ltd. Dongtan Laboratory.
The stated standard is Request of client.
Visual inspection after packaged vibration and drop testing reported no mechanical damage.
Performance check consisted of a display output check, referenced to Page 9.

entities.name: SGS Korea Co., Ltd.

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: Product : Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

concepts.name: Packaged vibration test
concepts.evidence: Packaged vibration test Packaged product/ Non-operation

concepts.name: Visual inspection for mechanical damage
concepts.evidence: Check the mechanical damage (deformation, crack, loosening of screw, separation, etc.)

concepts.name: Display output performance check
concepts.evidence: Performance check Check list Test result -. Display output check Refer to Page 9

evidence.claim: The tested product is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product : Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The report date shown on the first page is May 13, 2020.
evidence.evidenceText: May 13, 2020 SGS Korea Co., Ltd. Dongtan Laboratory

evidence.claim: The stated standard was Request of client.
The test location was SGS Korea Co., Ltd. Dongtan Laboratory.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Location : SGS KOREA Co., Ltd. Dongtan Laboratory
evidence.pageTarget: SGS Korea Co., Ltd. Dongtan Laboratory

evidence.claim: The packaged vibration test used sweep sine testing across vertical, transverse, and longitudinal axes.
evidence.evidenceText: Test type: Sweep sine; Test axis : Vertical (Z), Transverse (X), Longitudinal (Y)

evidence.claim: The drop test used a 1,000 mm drop height with corner, edges, and faces orientations for 10 total drops.
evidence.evidenceText: Drop height [mm] 1 000; Drop orientation Corner 1 Edges 3 Faces 6; Total number of drops 10

evidence.claim: Visual inspection found no mechanical damage after packaged vibration testing on all three axes.
evidence.evidenceText: Vertical (Z) No mechanical damage; Longitudinal (Y) No mechanical damage; Transverse (X) No mechanical damage

evidence.claim: Visual inspection found no mechanical damage after the drop test.
The performance check was a display output check referenced to Page 9.
evidence.evidenceText: Performance check Check list Test result -. Display output check Refer to Page 9

reviewFlags.reason: No revision or version value is present in the source text.
The stated standard is only Request of client; no external test standard or protocol identifier is provided.
Authority is ambiguous because the source is an SGS test laboratory report, not a regulatory authority decision or certificate.
Page 9 to Page 11 contain annex/performance check photo references with limited extractable text, and the OCR ends with stray text SGS9ApZuOW.
